headlines.title: Newly released video exposes Henry Nowak killer’s lies
headlines.snippet: Newly released footage has exposed that UK police arrested a dying stabbing victim based on a series of lies. The video reveals the deception that led to the wrongful arrest.

headlines.title: Trump justifies strikes on Iran amid ceasefire
headlines.snippet: The US has struck Iran in retaliation for what it claims was an Iranian attack on a ship in the Strait of Hormuz. This action escalates tensions following the incident.

headlines.title: Iran war live: US strikes Iran after attack on vessel in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.snippet: Iran's IRGC states it targeted US military assets in the region after the Trump administration launched an attack on the country. This action is in response to the US strikes.

headlines.title: US judge holds prosecutor in contempt in Charlie Kirk murder case
headlines.snippet: A judge has held a prosecutor in contempt of court in the Charlie Kirk murder case. The judge cited comments made to the media by prosecutors about the defendant as violating court rules.

headlines.title: Venezuela shaken by magnitude 4.9 tremor days after major earthquakes
headlines.snippet: Venezuela has been shaken by a magnitude 4.9 tremor, days after being hit by devastating earthquakes that killed hundreds. The country is still recovering from the earlier seismic events.

headlines.title: UN aid chief outlines ‘six asks’ after Israel-Lebanon deal
headlines.snippet: The UN aid chief has outlined 'six asks' following a deal between Israel and Lebanon. Tom Fletcher described the agreement as a 'moment of hope' but noted Lebanon faces a grave humanitarian crisis due to Israeli military attacks.

headlines.title: Kpler: Qatar-Energy LNG tanker latest to reverse course near Hormuz
headlines.snippet: A QatarEnergy LNG tanker has reversed course near the Strait of Hormuz, following a similar action by another vessel. This move adds uncertainty to LNG shipping through the Gulf amid warnings from Iran's IRGC about unauthorized routes.

headlines.title: JD Vance defends US strikes, warns Iran against escalation
headlines.snippet: JD Vance defended recent US strikes and warned Iran against escalation, stating "Violence will be met with violence." He urged Iran to use established communication channels for any disagreements regarding the ceasefire agreement.

headlines.title: Hezbollah supporters block Beirut road to protest Israel-Lebanon agreement
headlines.snippet: Hezbollah supporters have blocked a road in Beirut to protest an agreement signed by Israel and Lebanon. Protesters rode motorbikes and used burning tires to block a road, shouting slogans against the deal.

headlines.title: ‘Washington violated commitments’: IRGC says it targeted US forces in the region
headlines.snippet: Iran's IRGC announced it targeted US military locations in response to alleged US violations of commitments. The group warned of a broader response if such actions are repeated.

headlines.title: France’s terrorism apology law faces test in pro-Palestine case
